full_dossier.mobility_priority: Mobility was prioritized over firepower and armor in the Leopard 1A2's design, reflecting Cold War-era doctrine that emphasized speed and maneuverability on a potential nuclear battlefield.
full_dossier.armor_limitation: The Leopard 1A2's armor is relatively light, based on the historical assumption that protection against hollow charge weapons was impractical, making it vulnerable to modern anti-tank threats.
full_dossier.firepower_compatibility: Equipped with the NATO-standard 105 mm L7A3 gun, the Leopard 1A2 maintains interoperability with Western ammunition supplies and proven anti-armor performance against contemporary Cold War-era tanks.
full_dossier.nuclear_warfare_design: Designed to operate in chemically or radiologically contaminated environments, the Leopard 1A2 reflects 1950s–60s expectations of battlefield nuclear engagement, where survivability relied on mobility rather than heavy armor.

short_specs.manufacturer: United Defense (1981–1995), BAE Systems Platforms & Services (2004'ten beri)
short_specs.armour: Her yönden 14,5 mm koruma sağlayan katmanlı lamine zırh. Gövde tabanı 7017 alüminyum alaşımdır
short_specs.ammunition: 300 hazır mermi (70 AP tipi, 230 HE tipi), 600 mermi depoda

full_dossier.strategic_role: Birleşik silahlar manevrası için M1 Abrams hızıyla eşleşmek üzere tasarlandı, daha yavaş M113 APC'lerini değiştirdi.
full_dossier.anti_armor_limitation: 25 mm otomatik top, ana muharebe tanklarını vurmak için optimal değildir; zırh delici kabiliyeti için TOW füzelerine güveniyor.
full_dossier.combat_deployment: Körfez Savaşı, Irak Savaşı, Yemen İç Savaşı, Suriye İç Savaşı ve Rus-Ukrayna Savaşı'nda kanıtlandı.
full_dossier.design_origin: Sovyet BMP ailesine yanıt olarak geliştirildi, amfibi yetenek ve çift APC/tank öldürme rollerine vurgu yaptı.

short_specs.manufacturer: United Defense (1981–1995), BAE Systems Platforms & Services (с 2004 года)
short_specs.unit_cost: 3 166 000 долларов США в 1998 году
short_specs.speed: 64 км/ч; 40 км/ч по пересеченной местности; 7,2 км/ч на воде
short_specs.armour: Ламинированная броня, обеспечивающая защиту 14,5 мм со всех сторон. Основание корпуса - алюминиевый сплав 7017
short_specs.ammunition: 300 готовых выстрелов (70 типа AP, 230 типа HE), 600 выстрелов в хранилище

full_dossier.strategic_role: Разработана для совместных действий с танками M1 Abrams, заменив более медленные БМП M113.
full_dossier.anti_armor_limitation: 25-мм автоматическая пушка не оптимальна для борьбы с основными танками; полагается на противотанковые ракеты TOW.
full_dossier.combat_deployment: Применялась в войнах в Персидском заливе, Ираке, Йемене, Сирии и в российско-украинском конфликте.
full_dossier.design_origin: Разработана в ответ на семейство советских БМП, подчеркивая амфибийные возможности и двойную роль БМП/танкобойца.

short_specs.manufacturer: United Defense (1981–1995)، BAE Systems Platforms & Services (منذ 2004)
short_specs.speed: 64 كم/سا؛ 40 كم/سا في التضاريس؛ 7.2 كم/سا في الماء
short_specs.armour: درع لامين ي 제공 حماية 14.5 ملم من جميع الجوانب. قاعدة الهيكل من سبيكة الألومنيوم 7017
short_specs.ammunition: 300 طلقة جاهزة (70 نوع AP، 230 نوع HE)، 600 طلقة في المخزن

full_dossier.strategic_role: صممت لتلائم سرعة دبابات M1 Abrams للقتال المشترك، واستبدلت المركبات القتالية المسلحة M113 الأبطأ.
full_dossier.anti_armor_limitation: المدفع الأوتوماتيكي 25 ملم ليس مثاليًا لمواجهة الدبابات الرئيسية؛ يعتمد على صواريخ TOW المضادة للدبابات.
full_dossier.combat_deployment: أثبتت نفسها في حرب الخليج، وحرب العراق، والحرب الأهلية اليمنية، والحرب الأهلية السورية، والصراع الروسي الأوكراني.
full_dossier.design_origin: تم تطويرها استجابةً للعائلة السوفيتية من مركبات قتال المشاة، مع التركيز على القدرات Amphibious والقتل المزدوج للمشاة والدبابات.

short_specs.manufacturer: United Defense (1981–1995)，BAE Systems Platforms & Services (2004年至今)
short_specs.speed: 64公里/小时；40公里/小时越野；7.2公里/小时水上
short_specs.armour: 层压装甲，提供14.5毫米全方位保护。车体底盘为7017铝合金
short_specs.ammunition: 300发备用弹（70发AP弹，230发HE弹），600发弹储存

full_dossier.strategic_role: 设计用于匹配M1艾布拉姆斯坦克的速度，用于联合兵种机动，取代较慢的M113装甲运兵车。
full_dossier.anti_armor_limitation: 25毫米自动炮不适合用于对抗主战坦克；依赖TOW反坦克导弹进行反坦克作战。
full_dossier.combat_deployment: 在海湾战争、伊拉克战争、也门内战、叙利亚内战和俄乌冲突中证明了其价值。
full_dossier.design_origin: 作为对苏联BMP系列的回应，强调两栖能力和双重APC/坦克杀伤能力。

short_specs.manufacturer: United Defense (19811995), BAE Systems Platforms & Services (since 2004)
short_specs.speed: 40 mi/h; 40 km/h off-road; 7.2 km/h in water
short_specs.armour: Spaced laminate armor offering 14.5 mm all around protection. Hull base is 7017 Aluminum alloy
short_specs.ammunition: 300 ready rounds (70 AP-type, 230 HE-type), 600 rounds in storage

full_dossier.strategic_role: Designed to match M1 Abrams speed for combined arms maneuver, replacing slower M113 APCs.
full_dossier.anti_armor_limitation: 25 mm autocannon is not optimal for engaging main battle tanks; relies on TOW missiles for anti-armor capability.
full_dossier.combat_deployment: Proven in Gulf War, Iraq War, Yemeni Civil War, Syrian Civil War, and Russo-Ukrainian War.
full_dossier.design_origin: Developed in response to Soviet BMP family, emphasizing amphibious capability and dual APC/tank-killer roles.

short_specs.manoeuvrability: tam döngü ve negatif g manevraları yapabilme kapasitesine sahiptir

full_dossier.multirole_capability: Tiger, silahlı gözetleme, anti tank operasyonları, yakın hava desteği ve koruma görevleri dahil olmak üzere çeşitli savaş görevleri için tasarlanmıştır. Dinamik sahalar üzerinde operasyonel esneklik sağlar.
full_dossier.all_weather_operations: Gün/Gece operasyonları ve CBRN sonrası ortamlarda tüm hava koşullarında çalışmak için donatılmıştır. Hayatta kalma kapasitesini ve görev dayanıklılığını artırır.
full_dossier.maritime_adaptability: Frigatlar ve ekstrem deniz hava koşullarında gemi operasyonları için sertifikalandırılmıştır. Deniz ve kıyı operasyonları için dağıtım seçeneklerini genişletir.
full_dossier.crew_autonomy: Çift rolü mürettebat istasyonlarıyla yüksek operasyonel otonomiye sahiptir. Her iki pilot veya nişancı da uçuş veya silah kontrolünü üstlenebilir. Taktiksel yanıt hızını artırır.
full_dossier.design_tradeoffs: Yüksek manevra kabiliyeti ve gelişmiş aviyonik sistemler, geleneksel saldırı helikopterlerine göre pilot iş yükünü ve kapsamlı yeniden eğitim gereksinimini artırır.

short_specs.engines: 2 × MTU Turbomeca Rolls-Royce MTR390 турбовинтовой двигатель
short_specs.manoeuvrability: способен выполнять полные петли и маневры с отрицательной перегрузкой
capable of full loops and negative g manoeuvres

full_dossier.multirole_capability: The Tiger is designed for diverse combat missions including armed reconnaissance, anti-tank operations, close air support, and escort duties, enabling operational flexibility across dynamic battlefields.
full_dossier.all_weather_operations: Equipped for day/night operations in all weather conditions, including post-CBRN environments, enhancing survivability and mission endurance.
full_dossier.maritime_adaptability: Certified for shipboard operations from frigates and in extreme maritime weather, expanding deployment options for naval and coastal operations.
full_dossier.crew_autonomy: Features high operational autonomy with dual-role crew stations, allowing either pilot or gunner to assume flight or weapons control, increasing tactical responsiveness.
full_dossier.design_tradeoffs: High agility and advanced avionics come at the cost of increased pilot workload and extensive retraining requirements compared to legacy attack helicopters.

short_specs.name: B-47 Stratojet
short_specs.max_ias: 786 km/sa kontrol tersine dönmeyi önlemek için

full_dossier.design_innovation: B-47 Stratojet, 35-derece eğik kanat ve modüler motorlar gibi devrim niteliğinde tasarım unsurlarıyla gelecekteki jet uçağının şablonunu oluşturdu.
full_dossier.strategic_role: Yüksek irtifa ve yüksek hızlı nükleer bombardıman uçağı olarak B-47, Sovyet hava sahasına girme yeteneğiyle Soğuk Savaş'ın ABD'li deterans stratejisinin merkezinde yer aldı.
full_dossier.flight_control_challenge: Yüksek hızlarda kanat esnekliği ve kontrol tersine dönmeye karşı dikkatli uçuş alan yönetimi gerektirdi, bu da maksimum gösterge hava hızını sınırladı.
full_dossier.engineering_legacy: Başlangıçta eleştirilere rağmen B-47'nin tasarımı, Boeing 707 gibi ticari ve askeri jet uçağı projelerini doğrudan etkiledi.

full_dossier.design_innovation: The B-47 Stratojet introduced revolutionary design elements including a 35-degree swept wing and podded engines, setting the template for future jet aircraft.
full_dossier.strategic_role: As a high-altitude, high-speed nuclear bomber, the B-47 was central to U.S. Cold War deterrence strategy, capable of penetrating Soviet airspace.
full_dossier.flight_control_challenge: Wing flexibility and risk of control reversal at high speeds required careful flight envelope management, limiting maximum indicated airspeed despite higher potential performance.
full_dossier.engineering_legacy: Despite initial skepticism, the B-47's configuration proved highly influential, directly informing the design of commercial and military jet aircraft like the Boeing 707.

short_specs.name: Z-10
short_specs.design_group:
602. Hava Gemisi Tasarım Enstitüsü
Kamov Tasarım Bürosu
short_specs.primary_user:
Halk Kurtuluş Ordusu Kara Kuvvetleri Hava Kuvvetleri
Halk Kurtuluş Ordusu Hava Kuvvetleri
Pakistan Ordusu Hava Kuvvetleri

full_dossier.stealth_design: Z-10, radar kesitini azaltmak için rombüs şeklinde bir gövde kesitine ve radar emici malzemelere sahiptir, düşük gözlemlenme kapasitesi sağlar.
full_dossier.rotor_system: Bir beş pala ana rotoru ve dört pala çapraz konfigürasyonlu kuyruk rotoru ile donatılmıştır, gürültü ve titreşimi azaltarak hayatta kalma ve operasyonel gizliliği artırır.
full_dossier.armor_and_survivability: Rotor pelleri karbon fiber kirişler ve honi kompozit kaplamalarla donatılmıştır, 12.7 mm mermileri dayanabilir, savaş dayanıklılığını artırır.
full_dossier.design_origin: Kamov'un başlangıç tasarım girdileri, Rus uzmanlık ve Çin inovasyonunu birleştiren helikopterin aerodinamik düzenini etkilemiştir.
full_dossier.operational_context: Batıya erişimi sınırlayan silah ambargolarının ardından Çin'in özel saldırı helikopteri ihtiyacını karşılamak için geliştirilmiştir, yerli askeri hava taşıtı kapasitesine geçişin bir göstergesidir.

short_specs.name: Z-10
short_specs.design_group:
602-й Авиационный Институт Проектирования
Камовский Проектный Бюро
short_specs.primary_user:
Воздушно-десантные войска Народно-освободительной армии
Военно-воздушные силы Народно-освободительной армии
Вертолётные войска армии Пакистана

short_specs.name: Z-10
short_specs.design_group:
602nd Aircraft Design Institute
Kamov Design Bureau
short_specs.primary_user:
People's Liberation Army Ground Force Aviation
People's Liberation Army Air Force
Pakistan Army Aviation Corps

full_dossier.stealth_design: The Z-10 features a rhombic fuselage cross-section and radar-absorbent materials to reduce radar cross section, providing a degree of low observability.
full_dossier.rotor_system: Equipped with a five-blade main rotor and a four-blade scissor-configured tail rotor to reduce noise and vibration, enhancing survivability and operational stealth.
full_dossier.armor_and_survivability: Rotor blades incorporate carbon fiber spars and honeycomb composite skins, capable of withstanding 12.7mm rounds, improving combat resilience.
full_dossier.design_origin: Initial design input from Kamov contributed to the helicopter's aerodynamic layout, blending Russian expertise with Chinese innovation.
full_dossier.operational_context: Developed to meet China's need for a dedicated attack helicopter after arms embargoes limited Western access, marking a shift toward indigenous military aviation capability.

short_specs.armour: kompozit, alüminyum/çelik, karbon fiber ve seramikler dahil
short_specs.primary_armament: 105 mm L7 çapraz namlu tabanca (P1), 120 mm Giat Sanayi G1 düz namlu tabanca (P2)
short_specs.secondary_armament: M2HB 12.7 mm makineli tüfek x2 (paralel ve çatı montajlı)

full_dossier.commercial_viability_concerns: Yarışmacı teknik performansa rağmen, EE-T1 Osório, ithal edilen bileşenlere bağımlılık ve yedek parça/yedek ekipman tedarik zincirlerindeki algılanan güvenilmezlik nedeniyle ticari sürdürülebilirlik konusunda sorunlarla karşılaştı.
full_dossier.market_positioning: İhracat için maliyet etkin bir ana savaş zırhlısı olarak tasarlanan EE-T1, benzeri Batılı ASZ'lerden önemli ölçüde daha düşük fiyatlıydı (tahmini birim maliyet 1.5–2 milyon dolar arasında), Brezilya'nın büyüyen savunma sanayi kapasitelerinden yararlanmayı hedefliyordu.
full_dossier.strategic_limitation: Yabancı satımlar için tasarlandığına rağmen, tank ihracat siparişleri alamadı; Aljazer gibi potansiyel müşteriler satın almayı tamamlamadı, küresel silah pazarında güvenilirlik kurma konusunda zorlukları ortaya koydu.

short_specs.armour: композит, включая алюминий/сталь, углеродные волокна и керамику
short_specs.primary_armament: 105 мм L7 нарезной пушка (P1), 120 мм Giat Industries G1 гладкоствольная пушка (P2)
short_specs.secondary_armament: M2HB 12,7 мм пулемет x2 (соосный и крыша смонтирован)

full_dossier.commercial_viability_concerns: Несмотря на конкурентоспособные технические характеристики, EE-T1 Osório столкнулся с сомнениями относительно коммерческой жизнеспособности из-за зависимости от импортных компонентов и предполагаемой ненадежности цепочек поставок запасных частей и аксессуаров.
full_dossier.market_positioning: Спроектированный как экономичный основной боевой танк для экспорта, EE-T1 был значительно дешевле аналогичных западных ОБТ, с оценочной стоимостью единицы между 1,5–2 млн долларов, стремясь использовать растущие оборонные промышленные возможности Бразилии.
full_dossier.strategic_limitation: Хотя он был предназначен для иностранных продаж, танк не получил экспортных заказов, потенциальные клиенты, такие как Алжир, не завершили закупки, что подчеркивает трудности в установлении репутации на глобальном рынке вооружений.

short_specs.armour: composite, including aluminum/steel, carbon fibers, and ceramics
short_specs.primary_armament: 105 mm L7 rifled gun (P1), 120 mm Giat Industries G1 smoothbore gun (P2)
short_specs.secondary_armament: M2HB 12.7 mm machine gun x2 (coaxial and roof mounted)

full_dossier.commercial_viability_concerns: Despite competitive technical performance, the EE-T1 Osório faced doubts over commercial viability due to reliance on imported components and perceived unreliability in supply chains for spare parts and accessories.
full_dossier.market_positioning: Designed as a cost-effective main battle tank for export, the EE-T1 was priced significantly lower than comparable Western MBTs, with estimated unit costs between $1.5–2 million, aiming to leverage Brazil's growing defense industrial capabilities.
full_dossier.strategic_limitation: Although intended for foreign sales, the tank failed to secure export orders, with potential customers like Algeria not finalizing procurement, highlighting challenges in establishing credibility in the global arms market.

short_specs.builders: Jiangnan Gemi Endüstrisi, Dalian Gemi Endüstrisi
short_specs.length: İlk versiyon: 156 m, 157 m; Uzatılmış uçuş düzlemi versiyonu: 161 m
short_specs.propulsion: COGAG
short_specs.sensors: Tip 346A AESA radar, Tip 518 L-bant radar, VDS ve doğrusal çekme dizi sonar
short_specs.armament: 64 hücreli evrensel VLS (32 önde, 32 arkada), GJB 5860-2006 standardının uygulanması

full_dossier.strategic_role: Tip 052D, Çin denizaltı filosunun modern yüzey filosunun temelini oluşturan, denizaltı savunma ve çok amaçlı savaş kapasitesinde önemli bir atılım temsil eder.
full_dossier.radar_advantage: Tip 346A AESA radar ile donatılmıştır ve önceki modellerden daha gelişmiş gizli hedeflerin tespit mesafesi ve izleme doğruluğu sağlar.
full_dossier.vls_flexibility: Evrensel kovan tabanlı VLS sisteminin benimsenmesi, Tip 052D'ye HHQ-9 hava savunma füzeleri, YJ-18 denizaltı巡航导弹, ve potansiyel olarak kara saldırı巡航导弹 fırlatma kapasitesi kazandırır.
full_dossier.asw_capability: Entegre değişken derinlik sonar (VDS) ve çekme dizi sonar, özellikle derin ve sahil sularında denizaltı savunma performansını önemli ölçüde artırır.
full_dossier.design_limitation: Gelişmiş sistemlere rağmen, Tip 052D, Tip 055 gibi daha büyük denizaltıların enerji üretim ve komuta altyapısına sahip değildir, bu da denizaltı saldırı grubu koruma veya en üst düzey hava ve füze savunma görevlerinde sınırlamalar yaratır.

short_specs.length: Initial variant: 156 m, 157 m; Extended flight deck variant: 161 m
short_specs.propulsion: COGAG
short_specs.sensors: Type 346A AESA radar, Type 518 L-band radar, VDS and linear towed array sonar
short_specs.armament: 64-cell universal VLS (32 forward, 32 aft), implementation of GJB 5860-2006 standard

full_dossier.strategic_role: The Type 052D represents a significant leap in Chinese naval air defense and multi-role combat capability, serving as a backbone of the modern PLAN surface fleet.
full_dossier.radar_advantage: Equipped with the Type 346A AESA radar, it offers improved detection range and tracking accuracy against stealth and low-observable targets compared to earlier models.
full_dossier.vls_flexibility: The adoption of a universal canister-based VLS system allows the Type 052D to launch a variety of missiles, including HHQ-9 surface-to-air missiles, YJ-18 anti-ship cruise missiles, and potentially land-attack cruise missiles, enhancing its mission adaptability.
full_dossier.asw_capability: Integrated variable depth sonar (VDS) and towed array sonar significantly improve anti-submarine warfare performance, particularly in deep and littoral waters.
full_dossier.design_limitation: Despite its advanced systems, the Type 052D lacks the power generation and command infrastructure of larger destroyers like the Type 055, limiting its role in carrier strike group escort or integrated air and missile defense at the highest echelons.

short_specs.propulsion: Yüzey etkisi
short_specs.armament: Çeşitli (76 mm, 57 mm veya 30 mm toplar, Kh-35 füzeleri, alt sınıfa göre)

full_dossier.modernization_indicator: Nongo sınıfı gemiler, Kuzey Kore Deniz Kuvvetlerinin modernizasyonunda önemli bir adımı temsil eder; daha hızlı ve manevra kabiliyetli deniz savaş gemilerine, denizaltı füze yeteneklerine geçiş gösterir.
full_dossier.strategic_limitation: Hız ve silah donanımlarıyla birlikte, aktif olarak kullanımda olan küçük sayıda birim (tamamlanan tahmini altı) Kuzey Kore'nin denizcilik altyapısında üretim kapasitesinin veya operasyonel kısıtlamaların sınırlı olduğunu gösterir.

short_specs.length: 35 м или 40 м (в зависимости от подкласса)
short_specs.propulsion: Поверхностный эффект
short_specs.armament: Разнообразные (76 мм, 57 мм или 30 мм орудий, ракеты Х-35, в зависимости от подкласса)

full_dossier.modernization_indicator: Корабли класса Нонго представляют собой значительный шаг в модернизации Корейского народного флота, указывающий на переход к более быстрым и маневренным кораблям-носителям противокорабельных ракет.
full_dossier.strategic_limitation: Несмотря на скорость и вооружение, малое количество действующих единиц (оценка: шесть завершённых) указывает на ограниченную производственную мощность или операционные ограничения в военно-морской инфраструктуре Северной Кореи.

short_specs.propulsion: تأثير السطح
short_specs.armament: متنوعة (76 مم، 57 مم، أو 30 مم بطاريات، صواريخ خ-35، حسب الفئة الفرعية)

full_dossier.modernization_indicator: تُمثل سفن فئة النونغو خطوة مهمة في تحديث البحرية الكورية، مما يدل على الانتقال نحو وحدات سطحية أسرع وأكثر مرونة مزودة بقدرات صاروخية مضادة للسفن.
full_dossier.strategic_limitation: رغم سرعتها وعتادها، يشير العدد المحدود من الوحدات النشطة (تقدير: ستة أنجزت) إلى قدرة إنتاجية محدودة أو قيود تشغيلية داخل البنية التحتية البحرية لكوريا الشمالية.

short_specs.propulsion: 气垫推进
short_specs.armament: 多种（76毫米、57毫米或30毫米火炮，Kh-35导弹，视子级而定）

full_dossier.modernization_indicator: 怒农级舰艇代表朝鲜人民海军现代化的重要进展，表明其向更快、更灵活的水面作战舰艇和反舰导弹能力的转变。
full_dossier.strategic_limitation: 尽管具备速度和火力，但现役单位数量有限（估计已完工6艘）表明朝鲜海军基础设施的生产能力或运营限制。

short_specs.length: 35 m or 40 m (according to the subclass)
short_specs.propulsion: Surface effect
short_specs.armament: Various (76 mm, 57 mm, or 30 mm guns, Kh-35 missiles, according to the sub-class)

full_dossier.modernization_indicator: The Nongo-class vessels represent a significant step in the modernization of the Korean People's Navy, indicating a shift toward faster, more agile surface combatants with anti-ship missile capabilities.
full_dossier.strategic_limitation: Despite their speed and armament, the small number of active units (estimated six completed) suggests limited production capacity or operational constraints within North Korea's naval infrastructure.

short_specs.total_ships_completed: 76 (Aktif gemiler + 1 Flight III ve 1 Flight IIA Teknoloji Ekleme)

full_dossier.origin_and_role: Yüksek maliyetli Ticonderoga sınıfı kruvazörlerle tamamlamak için düşük maliyetli Aegis donanımlı bir gemi olarak geliştirildi, Deniz Kuvvetleri'nin Elmo Zumwalt Amiral tarafından başlatılan 'yüksek-düşük karışımı' stratejisini yerine getirdi.
full_dossier.strategic_context: Eski Charles F. Adams, Farragut, Leahy ve Belknap sınıflı gemilerin yerine konmak üzere tasarlanan Arleigh Burke sınıfı, 1988'den beri sürdürülen üretim ile ABD Deniz Kuvvetleri yüzey savaş gemilerinin temeli haline geldi.
full_dossier.procurement_trend: 74 aktif gemi ve 13 daha siparişte olmak üzere sınıf, modern tehdit ortamlarına uyum sağlayabilen ve uzun vadeli stratejik ilgisi olan Flight III varyantlarında aktif üretimde kalmaya devam etmektedir.

short_specs.cost: 2,2 миллиарда долларов США на корабль (Финансовый год 2024)
short_specs.total_ships_completed: 76 (Активные корабли + 1 Flight III и 1 Flight IIA Техническое включение)

full_dossier.origin_and_role: Разработан как дешевый корабль с системой Aegis для сопровождения высокотехнологичных крейсеров класса Тикондерога, реализуя стратегию «высокий-низкий», инициированную адмиралом Элмо Зумвальтом.
full_dossier.strategic_context: Спроектированный для замены устаревших кораблей классов Charles F. Adams, Farragut, Leahy и Belknap, класс Arleigh Burke стал основой флота ВМС США, с непрерывным производством с 1988 года.
full_dossier.procurement_trend: С 74 активными кораблями и 13 на заказе, класс остается в активном производстве (варианты Flight III), отражая свою долгосрочную стратегическую значимость и адаптивность к современным угрозам.

short_specs.total_ships_completed: 76 (Active ships + 1 Flight III and 1 Flight IIA Technology Insertion)

full_dossier.origin_and_role: Developed as a lower-cost Aegis-equipped vessel to complement the high-end Ticonderoga-class cruisers, fulfilling the Navy's 'high-low mix' strategy initiated by Admiral Elmo Zumwalt.
full_dossier.strategic_context: Designed to replace aging Charles F. Adams, Farragut, Leahy, and Belknap-class vessels, the Arleigh Burke class became the backbone of U.S. Navy surface combatants with sustained production since 1988.
full_dossier.procurement_trend: With 74 active ships and 13 more on order, the class remains in active production (Flight III variants), reflecting its enduring strategic relevance and adaptability to modern threat environments.

short_specs.unit_cost: $4.9 milyon
short_specs.armament: ZPT-98A 125 mm püskürtmeli top, 12.7 mm ağır makineli tüfek (uzaktan kumandalı)
short_specs.ammunition: APFSDS, HEAT, HE, anti-tank kılavuzlu füzeler
short_specs.fire_control_system: Panoramik hedef alıcısı ile avcı-avcı özellikleri, lazer mesafeölçer, Thales Catherine-FC termal görüntüleme cihazı
short_specs.protection: Kompozit zırh, FY-4 ERA, NBC koruma, patlama bastırma sistemi, yangın söndürme sistemi
short_specs.mobility: VT/E1 1.200 hp dizel motoru, burulma çubuğu süspansiyonu, Ch1000B otomatik vites kutusu

full_dossier.strategic_insight: VT-4, Çin'in tamamen yerli, yüksek performanslı ihracat odaklı ana muharebe zırhlı tanklara geçişini temsil eder. Tip 96B ve Tip 99A gibi yerli platformlardan test edilmiş alt sistemleri kullanarak güvenilirlik ve savaş etkinliği sağlar.
full_dossier.combat_proven: Asimetrik çatışmalarda, İslam Devleti'ne karşı savaşı ve Boko Haram isyanı gibi operasyonlarda kullanılmıştır. Gerçek dünya çatışmalarında isyan karşıtı operasyonlarda gösterilmiştir.
full_dossier.vulnerability_context: Ön koruma katmanlı olsa da, temel modellerde doğrulanmış gelişmiş APS entegrasyonunun olmaması, modern üst saldırı mühimmatına ve tandem savaş başlıklı ATGM'lerine karşı potansiyel zafiyet gösterir.
full_dossier.export_impact: 4.9 milyon dolarlık fiyat etiketiyle VT-4, batılı MBT'lerin alternatifi olarak maliyet etkin bir çözüm sunar. Dijital ateş kontrolü ve termal görüntüleme ile modern zırhlı araç arayan bütçe bilinçli ordular için cazip bir alternatiftir.
full_dossier.technological_milestone: 1.200 hp motorunun ve otomatik vites kutusunun yerli üretimi, Çin'in rekabetçi güç paketleri üretme kapasitesinde bir dönüm noktası oluşturur. Ukrayna gibi yabancı tedarikçilere olan bağımlılığı azaltır.

short_specs.unit_cost: $4.9 million
short_specs.armament: ZPT-98A 125 mm smoothbore gun, 12.7 mm heavy machine gun (remote controlled)
short_specs.ammunition: APFSDS, HEAT, HE, anti-tank guided missiles
short_specs.fire_control_system: Panoramic sight with hunter-killer capabilities, laser rangefinder, Thales Catherine-FC thermal imager
short_specs.protection: Composite armour, FY-4 ERA, NBC protection, explosion-suppression system, fire-extinguishing system
short_specs.mobility: VT/E1 1,200 hp diesel engine, torsion bar suspension, Ch1000B automatic transmission

full_dossier.strategic_insight: The VT-4 represents China's shift toward fully indigenous, high-performance export-oriented main battle tanks, leveraging proven subsystems from domestic platforms like the Type 96B and Type 99A for reliability and combat effectiveness.
full_dossier.combat_proven: Operational in asymmetric conflicts including the War against the Islamic State and Boko Haram insurgency, demonstrating real-world deployment in counterinsurgency operations.
full_dossier.vulnerability_context: While frontal protection is robust, the lack of confirmed advanced APS integration on baseline models suggests potential vulnerability to modern top-attack munitions and tandem-warhead ATGMs.
full_dossier.export_impact: Priced at $4.9 million, the VT-4 offers a cost-effective alternative to Western MBTs, appealing to budget-conscious militaries seeking modern armor with digital fire control and thermal imaging.
full_dossier.technological_milestone: Domestic development of the 1,200 hp engine and automatic transmission marks a breakthrough in China's ability to produce competitive powerpacks, reducing reliance on foreign suppliers like Ukraine.

short_specs.class_after: Columbia (balistik füze denizaltı varyantı), Virginia (kruvazör füze denizaltı varyantı)
short_specs.logistics_hatches: Hızlı yeniden donanım için üç büyük lojistik kapağı

short_specs.class_after: Columbia (ballistic missile submarine variant), Virginia (cruise missile submarine variant)
short_specs.logistics_hatches: Three large logistics hatches for rapid resupply
short_specs.noise_level: As quiet at 20 kn as Lafayette-class at 6 kn
short_specs.construction_sites: Quonset Point, Rhode Island (production), Groton, Connecticut (assembly)
short_specs.strategic_role: Sea-based leg of U.S. nuclear triad

full_dossier.stealth_and_survivability: The Ohio-class submarines' exceptional quietness at cruising speeds significantly enhances their survivability and strategic deterrence capability, making them extremely difficult to detect—reportedly as quiet at 20 knots as previous classes were at 6 knots.
full_dossier.operational_efficiency: The use of dual crews (Blue and Gold) and large logistics hatches enables rapid turnaround between patrols, maximizing operational availability and minimizing downtime for resupply and maintenance.
full_dossier.strategic_importance: As the sea-based leg of the U.S. nuclear triad, the 14 SSBNs provide a continuous, survivable, and credible nuclear deterrent, forming a cornerstone of national strategic defense.
full_dossier.design_and_modularity: Constructed in modular 42-foot diameter sections, the design supports efficient manufacturing and maintenance, while enabling future adaptability as seen in the conversion of four boats to SSGNs for conventional strike and special operations missions.

full_dossier.designer: İsrail Tal tarafından başlatıldı, Kippur Savaşı'ndan alınan derslerle mürettebat korunumu ve hızlı saha bakımına odaklanan benzersiz bir ana muharebe tankı yaratıldı.

full_dossier.origin: Разработан Израилем в ответ на отказ в продаже танков Chieftain и потери тяжелой бронетехники во время Войны Киппур 1973 года, с акцентом на местное проектирование и выживание на поле боя.
full_dossier.designer: Инициирован Ицхаком Талем, используя уроки Войны Киппур для создания уникального основного боевого танка Израиля, ориентированного на защиту экипажа и быстрое полевое обслуживание.

full_dossier.designer: بدأت بواسطة إسرائيل تال، باستخدام الدروس المستفادة من حرب كيبور لخلق دبابة مقاتلة رئيسية إسرائيلية فريدة تركز على حماية الطاقم والصيانة السريعة في الميدان.

full_dossier.designer: 由以色列·塔尔发起，利用赎罪日战争的实战经验，打造了一款独特以色列主战坦克，专注于乘员保护和快速野战维护。

full_dossier.origin: Developed by Israel in response to denial of Chieftain tank sales and heavy armor losses during the 1973 Yom Kippur War, emphasizing indigenous design and battlefield survivability.
full_dossier.designer: Initiated by Israel Tal, leveraging combat lessons from the Yom Kippur War to create a uniquely Israeli main battle tank focused on crew protection and rapid field maintenance.
